titlestmt.titleproper: Robert (Elyse) collection on Ruth St. Denis
Finding Aid for the Elyse Robert collection on Ruth St. Denis LSC.1735
titlestmt.author: Finding aid prepared by Kelley Wolfe Bachli in the Center for Primary Research and Training (CFPRT), 2009; machine-readable finding aid created by Caroline Cubé.

address.addressline: Room A1713, Charles E. Young Research Library

publicationstmt.p: Finding aid description and metadata in this record are licensed under a Creative Commons Public Domain Designation (CC0 1.0 Universal). See LSC's Metadata Rights Statement for more information.

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2026-03-19 13:26:36 -0700.

did.unittitle: Elyse Robert collection on Ruth St. Denis
did.abstract: Elyse Robert (1901-1993) danced for Ruth St. Denis's Church of the Divine Dance between 1934 and 1968. During this time, Robert performed with Ruth St. Denis (1880-1968), a pioneer of modern dance, for many events and in numerous churches in the Los Angeles area. Collection includes dance costumes, correspondence, programs, photographs, and notes about Ruth St. Denis performances.
did.physloc: Portions of the collection stored off-site. Advance notice is required for access to the collection. All requests to access special collections materials must be made in advance using the request button located on this page.

accessrestrict.head: Restrictions on Access
accessrestrict.p: Open for research. All requests to access special collections materials must be made in advance using the request button located on this page.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use and Reproduction
userestrict.p: Property rights to the objects belong to UCLA Library Special Collections. All other rights, including copyright, are retained by the creators and their heirs. It is the responsibility of the researcher to determine who holds the copyright and pursue the copyright owner or his or her heir for permission to publish where The UC Regents do not hold the copyright.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: [Identification of item], Elyse Robert collection on Ruth St. Denis (Collection 1735). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library, University of California, Los Angeles.

processinfo.head: Processing Note
processinfo.p: Processed by Kelley Wolfe Bachli in the Center for Primary Research and Training (CFPRT), 2009.

Collections are processed to a variety of levels depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived user interest and research value, availability of staff and resources, and competing priorities. Library Special Collections provides a standard level of preservation and access for all collections and, when time and resources permit, conducts more intensive processing. These materials have been arranged and described according to national and local standards and best practices.

We are committed to providing ethical, inclusive, and anti-racist description of the materials we steward, and to remediating existing description of our materials that contains language that may be offensive or cause harm. We invite you to submit feedback about how our collections are described, and how they could be described more accurately, by filling out the form located on our website: Report Problematic Content and Description in UCLA's library collections and archives.

bioghist.head: Biography
bioghist.p: Elyse Robert (1901-1993) danced for Ruth St. Denis's Church of the Divine Dance between 1934 and 1968. During this time, Robert performed with Ruth St. Denis (1880-1968), a pioneer of modern dance, for many events and in numerous churches in the Los Angeles area.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Content
scopecontent.p: Collection includes material by and about Elyse Robert and Ruth St. Denis, including correspondence, programs, photographs, and notes about Ruth St. Denis dances and costumes. Boxes 1-3 in the collection contain costumes that belonged to Elyse Robert and were probably used in her dance performance with Ruth St. Denis. Box 4 contains photographs of dancers, newspaper clippings, programs, and dance choreography.

list.item: Boxes 1-3: costumes that belonged to Elyse Robert and were probably used in her dance performance with Ruth St. Denis.
Box 4: photographs of dancers, newspaper clippings, programs, and dance choreography.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Material
relatedmaterial.p: Ruth St. Denis Papers (Collection 1031) . UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library, University of California, Los Angeles.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Boxes 1-3 are stored in the B-level stacks on top of Rare Books, Range 15.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Boxes 1-3 are stored in the B-level stacks on top of Rare Books, Range 15.

did.unittitle: Photographs of Ruth St. Denis and other dancers. Many of the photographs are inscribed to Elyse Robert. 29 photographs and 2 negatives.
Photocopies of photographs of Ruth St. Denis and other dancers.
Newspaper clippings of advertisements and article critiques about Ruth St. Denis performances
Poems, some by Ruth St. Denis, many unattributed
Correspondence to Elyse Robert
Dance choreography
Ruth St. Denis and Elyse Robert dance programs
Writings by Ruth St. Denis and Elyse Robert
Religious images, pamphlets and printed material
Society of Spiritual Arts programs and informational handout
Scrapbook of poems, hand written programs, clipping, and Winter 1993 issue of Sacred Dance Guild Journal
Elyse Robert obituary and 2 photographs
